name: Content - HN Digest - Slack

parameters.formDescription: Click Submit to trigger the Hacker News digest and send it to Slack.

parameters.completionMessage: The Hacker News digest has been posted to Slack. Thanks for running it!

parameters.subject: ={{ '🗞️ Your HN Digest Summary — ' + $now.toFormat('MMMM d, yyyy') }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

Hacker News Daily Summary

' + $json.output + '

Generated automatically by your HN Digest automation.

' }}

parameters.completionMessage: The Hacker News digest has been posted to Slack and a story count summary has been emailed to you. Thanks for running it!

description: Runs daily at 8am, fetches top 5 HN stories, posts a digest to Slack, emails a ranked story count summary, and sends an AI-generated editorial summary to vishalm.mishra@fulcrumapp.com.
